nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: It has been a long time since you last slept. The night never reaches you, leaving your thoughts unrest.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: (grunts) Insomnia sucks. I wish there could be a way to travel inside my mind and fix it.

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Find a way to the kitchen.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: (Desperate) Doctors cannot treat me, so why do they keep telling me that one day I will finally be cured? I have no other way than relying on a pill from a madman!

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: (Angry) I would rather no one tell me how to solve it. I am solving this my way.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You are descending. However, a clash interrupts you.
